description_long: This is a three-story hostel building with a symmetrical, rectangular footprint and a steep, dark gray hip roof. The facade is dominated by large, evenly spaced rectangular windows arranged in a grid pattern across all visible sides, providing ample natural light to the interior. The main entrance is centrally located on the front side, featuring a small canopy, double doors, and flanked by potted plants, giving a welcoming appearance. The building is surrounded by a paved area with several mature trees and shrubs, adding greenery and shade. On one side, there are two blue balconies with metal railings, providing outdoor space for upper-floor residents. The overall design is functional and modern, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on practicality and comfort for urban living.
description: A modern, three-story hostel with a dark hip roof, large grid windows, a central entrance, and blue balconies on one side, surrounded by trees and paved grounds.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a canopy, double doors, and flanking potted plants, as well as the symmetrical window arrangement and landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting two blue balconies with metal railings and a tree adjacent to the building, with windows continuing the grid pattern.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain facade with evenly spaced windows and no visible entrance or balconies, bordered by trees on both sides.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring a small balcony above a secondary entrance, a streetlamp, and a tree, with the window grid continuing.
attribute_entrance_design: The main entrance is centrally located on the front facade, featuring a rectangular canopy above double doors. The entrance is framed by two potted plants and is slightly recessed, with a simple, modern design in white and gray tones. No steps or ramps are visible, and the entryway is flush with the paved ground.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are large, rectangular, and arranged in a uniform grid pattern across all facades, with three rows per floor and consistent spacing. Each window appears to have a white frame, and there are no visible shutters or decorative elements. The arrangement is highly symmetrical and modern.
attribute_balcony_presence: Balconies are present on one side of the building, with two blue metal-railed balconies stacked vertically, and a smaller white balcony on the opposite side above a secondary entrance.
attribute_architectural_style: Contemporary with modernist influences, characterized by clean lines, minimal ornamentation, and functional design.
